title: Remove src/providers/ dead code — switch imports to agentic-core
description:
After agentic-core integration, src/providers/ is dead code. Must clean up:
1. src/index.ts: change createProvider and Provider exports from './providers/index.js' to 'agentic-core'
2. src/types.ts: change Provider import from './providers/index.js' to 'agentic-core'
3. src/tools/shell.ts, code.ts, file.ts, search.ts: change ToolDefinition import from '../providers/provider.js' to 'agentic-core'
4. Delete src/providers/ directory entirely
5. Run full test suite — all 174 tests must pass
Acceptance: src/providers/ deleted, all imports point to agentic-core, tests pass
